name: New Registration Script
script:
#if frappe.form_dict.referral_code != None:
    
    
    #frappe.msgprint("yeeees")
#serverside
#Get all required fields from the document
role = doc.i_am

name = doc.name

total = doc.total
 

#first_name = doc.student_name


    
#smail = doc.student_email
suser = doc.student_username

sname = doc.student_name

#spass = doc.student_password
grade = doc.grade

subscription = doc.subscription

discount = doc.referral_discount

if doc.referral_code!= None:
    referral_code = doc.referral_code
    
    total = total - total*discount/100
else:
    referral_code ="solo"



if role == "Parent" and frappe.session.user == "Guest":
    ppass = doc.get_password("parent_password")
    spass = doc.get_password("student_password")
    smail = f"{suser}@gobezacademy.com"
    pname = doc.parent_name
    puser = doc.parent_username
    pmail = doc.parent_email
    pphone = doc.parent_phone
    
elif role == "Parent" and frappe.session.user != "Guest":
    parent = frappe.get_doc("User",frappe.session.user)
    pmail = parent.email
    pname = parent.first_name
    
    suser =doc.student_username
    pname = parent.first_name
    spass = doc.get_password("student_password")
    smail = f"{suser}@gobezacademy.com"
    sname = doc.student_name
elif role == "Student" and frappe.session.user !="Guest":
    sname = frappe.get_fullname
    smail = frappe.session.user
    #spass = doc.get_password("student_password")
    #smail =doc.student_email
else:
    suser = doc.student_username
    smail = doc.student_email
    spass = doc.get_password("student_password")
    sname = doc.student_name
    
# Parent Registration with student
if role == "Parent":
    # Check if users already exist
    if frappe.session.user == "Guest":
        parent_exists = frappe.db.exists("User", pmail) or frappe.db.exists("User", {"username": puser})
        student_exists = frappe.db.exists("User", smail) or frappe.db.exists("User", {"username": suser})
    else:
        parent_exists = frappe.db.exists("User", pmail)
        student_exists = frappe.db.exists("User", smail) or frappe.db.exists("User", {"username": suser})
        
    
    if not parent_exists and not student_exists and frappe.session.user == "Guest":
        try:
            # Create Parent User
            p_user = frappe.get_doc({
                "doctype": "User",
                "email": pmail,
                "first_name": pname,
                "username": puser,
                "new_password": ppass,
                "enabled": 1,
                "role_profile_name": "Parent",
                "user_type": "Website User"
            })
            p_user.db_insert()
            upd = frappe.get_doc("User",p_user.email)
            upd.notifications = 1
            upd.save(ignore_permissions=True)
            
            # Create Student User
            s_user = frappe.get_doc({
                "doctype": "User",
                "email": smail,
                "first_name": sname,
                "username": suser,
                "new_password": spass,
                "enabled": 1,
                "role_profile_name": "Student Gobez",
                "simultaneous_sessions": 1
                #"module_profile": "Student"
            })
            s_user.db_insert()
            upds = frappe.get_doc("User",s_user.email)
            upds.notifications = 1
            upds.save(ignore_permissions=True)
            
            email = pmail
            first_name = pname
            docr = frappe.new_doc("Registration")
            docr.name = name
            #docr.checkout_url = checkout_url
            # In your server-side code (after getting the checkout_url)
            if role =="Student":
                docr.mail = smail
                docr.student = smail
                docr.student_name =sname
            else:
                docr.mail = pmail
                docr.student = smail
                docr.student_name =sname
                #docr.parent_phone = pphone
            #docr.student = smail
            #docr.mail = smail
            docr.tx_ref = name
            docr.role = role
            docr.total = total
            docr.payment="Not Started"
            
            docr.batch = grade
            
            docr.referrer_code = referral_code
            
            
            docr.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
            
            
            frappe.msgprint(f"Users created for Parent {pname} and Student {sname}")
        except Exception as e:
            frappe.throw(f"Error creating users: {str(e)}")
    elif frappe.session.user != "Guest"  and not student_exists:
            s_user = frappe.get_doc({
                "doctype": "User",
                "email": f"{suser}@gobezacademy.com",
                "first_name": sname,
                "username": suser,
                "new_password": spass,
                "enabled": 1,
                "role_profile_name": "Student Gobez",
                "user_type": "Website User",
                "simultaneous_sessions": 1

                
                
            })
            s_user.db_insert()
            upds = frappe.get_doc("User",s_user.email)
            upds.notifications = 1
            upds.save(ignore_permissions=True)
            
            email = pmail
            first_name = pname
            frappe.msgprint(f"Users created Student {sname}")
            docr = frappe.new_doc("Registration")
            docr.name = name
            #docr.checkout_url = checkout_url
            # In your server-side code (after getting the checkout_url)
            if role =="Student":
                docr.mail = smail
                docr.student = smail
                docr.student_name =sname
            else:
                docr.mail = pmail
                docr.student = smail
                docr.student_name =sname
                #docr.parent_phone = pphone
            #docr.student = smail
            #docr.mail = smail
            docr.tx_ref = name
            docr.role = role
            docr.total = total
            docr.payment="Not Started"
            
            docr.batch = grade
            
            docr.referrer_code = referral_code

            docr.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
            
        
        
    #else:
    #    frappe.msgprint("A user with this email and/or username already exists. Please change your Username and/or Email")
     #   frappe.throw("Registration failed")
    

# Solo Student Registration
elif role == "Student" and frappe.session.user == "Guest":
    student_exists = frappe.db.exists("User", smail) or frappe.db.exists("User", {"username": suser})
    
    if not student_exists:
        try:
            s_user = frappe.get_doc({
                "doctype": "User",
                "email": smail,
                "first_name": sname,
                "username": suser,
                "new_password": spass,
                "enabled": 1,
                "role_profile_name": "Student Gobez",
                "user_type": "Website User",
                "simultaneous_sessions": 1

                
            })
            s_user.db_insert()
            upds = frappe.get_doc("User",s_user.email)
            upds.notifications = 1
            upds.save(ignore_permissions=True)
            email = smail
            first_name = sname
            frappe.msgprint(f"User created for Student {sname}")
            docr = frappe.new_doc("Registration")
            docr.name = name
            #docr.checkout_url = checkout_url
            # In your server-side code (after getting the checkout_url)
            if role =="Student":
                docr.mail = smail
                docr.student = smail
                docr.student_name =sname
            else:
                docr.mail = pmail
                docr.student = smail
                docr.student_name =sname
                #docr.parent_phone = pphone
            #docr.student = smail
            #docr.mail = smail
            docr.tx_ref = name
            docr.role = role
            docr.total = total
            docr.payment="Not Started"
            
            docr.batch = grade
            
            docr.referrer_code = referral_code

            
            docr.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
            
            
        except Exception as e:
            frappe.throw(f"Error creating user: {str(e)}")
    else:
        frappe.msgprint("A user with this email and/or username already exists.")
        frappe.throw("Registration failed")
elif role == "Student"and frappe.session.user !="Guest":
    stu = frappe.get_doc("User", frappe.session.user)
    first_name = stu.first_name
    email = stu.email
    sname = stu.first_name
    smail = stu.email
    email = smail
    first_name = sname
    docr = frappe.new_doc("Registration")
    docr.name = name
    #docr.checkout_url = checkout_url
    # In your server-side code (after getting the checkout_url)
    if role =="Student":
        docr.mail = smail
        docr.student = smail
        docr.student_name =sname
    else:
        docr.mail = pmail
        docr.student = smail
        docr.student_name =sname
        #docr.parent_phone = pphone
    #docr.student = smail
    #docr.mail = smail
    docr.tx_ref = name
    docr.role = role
    docr.total = total
    docr.payment="Not Started"
    docr.referrer_code = referral_code
    
    docr.batch = grade
    docr.insert(ignore_permissions=True)
            
            

else:
    frappe.throw("Invalid role specified")

# Payment initialization

name: Un-enroll
script:
today = frappe.utils.get_datetime()
frappe.log_error(f"Starting unenrollment process for date: {today}")

# Get all registrations with expired end dates but still marked as Verified
expired_registrations = frappe.get_all(
    "Registration",
    filters=[
        ["end", "<", today],
        ["payment", "=", "Verified"]
    ],
    fields=["name", "student", "batch", "mail", "end"]
)

frappe.log_error(f"Found {len(expired_registrations)} expired registrations to process")

for reg in expired_registrations:
    try:
        frappe.log_error(f"Processing registration {reg.name} for student {reg.student}, end date: {reg.end}")
        
        # Find the enrollment for this student and batch
        enrollments = frappe.get_all(
            "LMS Batch Enrollment",
            filters=[
                ["member", "=", reg.student],
                ["batch", "=", reg.batch]
            ],
            fields=["name"]
        )
        
        # Delete the enrollment if it exists
        if enrollments:
            for enroll in enrollments:
                frappe.delete_doc("LMS Batch Enrollment", enroll.name)
                frappe.log_error(f"Unenrolled student {reg.student} from batch {reg.batch}")
        
        # Update the registration payment status to "To Renew"
        frappe.db.set_value("Registration", reg.name, "payment", "To Renew")
        frappe.log_error(f"Updated registration {reg.name} to 'To Renew' status")
        
        # Commit after each successful registration update
        frappe.db.commit()
        
    except Exception as e:
        frappe.log_error(f"Error processing registration {reg.name}: {str(e)}")
        frappe.db.rollback()  # Rollback on error
        continue

frappe.log_error("Unenrollment process completed")
